target_prevalence: all images defective; rare target heterogeneous
gate_threshold: all 11 frozen checks; rare-image gain>=0.75; combined-class gain>=0.25
confound: full-image DINO may encode production texture; downstream evaluated separately
interpretation: Equal-budget discovery and taxonomy gain passed, but does not itself establish detector utility.

target_definition: detector development utility from frozen selected sets
gate_threshold: mAP gain>=0.010 and rare macro AP gain>=0.020 plus class/recall safety
confound: five acquisition realizations; development split reused; 15 paired training realizations are not 15 independent acquisitions
interpretation: Overall mAP increased +0.017378, but rare macro AP decreased -0.019877; translation gate failed.

target_prevalence: sparse anomaly within mixed official train/test-origin pool
gate_threshold: anomaly gain>=2; CI low>0; win rate>=0.65; category delta>=-0.25
confound: official-test-origin image count increased by 6.81/20; source composition explains part of gain
interpretation: Equal-budget anomaly discovery increased +6.245, while product-category coverage delta -0.325 violated safety.

gate_threshold: anomaly gain>=2; CI low>0; win rate>=0.65; category coverage not worse
confound: strategy concentrated on anomaly-rich visual/product modes; category collapse
interpretation: Largest discovery gain (+14.480/20) co-occurred with -4.110 object categories; success cannot be called coverage-safe.

gate_threshold: mAP gain>=0.01; >=4/5 wins; recall>=-0.01; class safety
confound: single favorable acquisition realization selected post-observation
interpretation: Training-seed stability (5/5 wins) shows a set effect, not acquisition-set generalization.

gate_threshold: mean mAP gain>=0.01; >=7/10 wins; exact sign-flip p<=0.05; recall nonnegative
confound: one training seed per acquisition; descriptive bootstrap CI includes zero
interpretation: The fixed-set effect did not generalize across acquisition realizations.

pool_condition: balanced large-pool V10c24 scale extension seed51 round2
gate_threshold: six frozen scale checks; positive mAP/recall/F1 and class safety
interpretation: At budget120, mAP50-95 delta was -0.004863; the candidate did not scale.

pool_condition: DCAL-XAI R1 detector difficulty+flip disagreement; initial20/query20

gate_threshold: all seven checks; query instances noninferiority vs Random
confound: 94/100 choices dominated by one-view flip detections; geometry/augmentation confound
interpretation: Rare coverage improved, but query instances -2.2 failed the frozen gate and the uncertainty mechanism was invalid.

target_definition: rare images and all-class coverage at initial budget
interpretation: Design-stage coverage candidate; cannot be upgraded to confirmation.

target_definition: rare images and all-class coverage at initial budget
gate_threshold: unchanged design thresholds: all-class>=0.90; all-rare>=0.90; min-two>=0.75; safety
confound: selection endpoint is coverage, not learner utility
interpretation: Holdout coverage safety passed and authorized only the frozen YOLOv8n screen.

gate_threshold: mAP noninferiority; rare macro noninferiority; worst-class safety; stability; recall noninferiority
confound: development only; acquisition seed is inferential unit
interpretation: Coverage gain did not translate: mAP -0.001678, rare macro AP -0.018290, recall -0.021871.

target_prevalence: class 8 target states only (351 rounds; 130 acquisition seeds)
confound: frozen replay only; alternative choices not fed into later states
interpretation: Best top-1 hit 0.153846 remained far below 0.50; representation branch is not recoverable.

pool_condition: existing Random140 checkpoints on 232-image development split
target_prevalence: error prevalence varies by checkpoint; not pooled across training seeds
gate_threshold: total-error enrichment>=1.50; CI low>1; AUROC>=0.65; Spearman>=0.20; stability>=0.50
confound: development split reused; total error mixes FP and FN; 5 acquisition units
interpretation: Six of seven checks passed, but the frozen primary effect-size gate failed at 1.115901.

confound: post-hoc endpoint; rare counts only 18 images/22 boxes; no untouched validation
interpretation: FN 1.379693 and rare-FN 1.785910 are hypothesis-generating, not a rescued AL PASS.

target_definition: defect presence/evidence and grounded bbox response
gate_threshold: parse>=0.90; informative>=0.90; positive presence>=0.50; defect evidence>=0.70
confound: oracle crop is easier than deployable full-image selection; still all-negative presence collapse
interpretation: Parse/informative rates were 1.0, but presence, evidence and median IoU were 0.

target_definition: balanced presence discrimination and bbox grounding
gate_threshold: all frozen compliance, sensitivity, specificity and grounding checks
